title: Ignition
description: Allows torches and campfires to set fire to nearby flammable blocks
body:
This mod allows torches and campfires to set fire to nearby flammable blocks.
With Ignition you'll be forced to think where you place down your torches or else your forest is gone.

Have a friend who spams torches? Want to teach them a lesson? Then this is the mod for you :D

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
